summary: Iteration 2 full-stack testing of The Line (Old-School Phone Revival). Backend: 35/35 pytest tests passed — /oracles CRUD incl. duplicate-slug 400, /personas returns only enabled resident+in-season oracles (verified traveling halloween oracle hidden in July), /session/dial routes menu key 1 -> 'Fortune Caller' with 9 slug-based personas, all 14 seeded secret codes (666,42,007,411,900,789,88,321,1955,2015,000,13,101,1313) plus 555xxxx wildcard 'The 555 Exchange', 411 & 900 include branches dict with keys, 007/1955/101 include clue text, /programs/fortune generates non-empty AI text + voice + sign_off for zoltan/sphinx/goy (Goy contains 'Lucky numbers:'), secret-codes CRUD supports branches+clue on POST and PATCH, /tts returns mp3 base64. Frontend: 4 Config tabs present (tab-programs/oracles/secrets/schedules), Oracles tab shows all 9 rows (oracle-row-zoltan/az/ruby/goy/calypso/zelda/count/sphinx/nyx) with add/edit/clone/delete; Secrets tab has secret-clue-input and BranchesEditor (add-branch-add / -key-N / -text-N) with MENU + CLUE badges rendered on 411/900/007/1955/101. Phone flow: lift-handset -> spoken menu; dial 1 -> Fortune Caller oracle list (9 oracles with keys 1-9 including 'Zartan Speaks', 'The Sphinx', 'Master Sum Dum Goy'); dial 4 + * -> AI fortune generated in ~8s with 'Lucky numbers:' + sign_off displayed in CRT; # returns to oracle picker; hangup + redial 4,1,1,* -> Directory Assistance branch menu, then pressing 1 plays forecast branch. No JS errors during full run.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py seed() uses $setOnInsert for personas — future edits to PERSONAS in seed_data.py will NOT propagate to existing docs; secret_codes uses $set (good). Consider aligning both to $set or documenting.
POST /api/oracles duplicate-check is only on slug; if slug is missing/empty Pydantic still permits '' — consider slug min_length validator.
POST /api/secret-codes still lacks duplicate 'code' check (same as prev iteration).
active_seasons() uses UTC month — near midnight in western timezones a traveler may briefly appear/disappear off local expectations. Acceptable for MVP.
PhoneSimulator.jsx is growing; call-state machine + oracle-picker rendering could be split for maintainability.
test_credentials: N/A (no auth). EMERGENT_LLM_KEY loaded from backend/.env.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 7 programs, 9 personas (all resident/all_year) and 15 secret codes on startup. Tests use TEST_ prefix and clean up (oracle CRUD flow, traveling seasonal oracle, secret code with branches).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL comes from /app/frontend/.env (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). backend_test.py auto-loads that env var. Fortune AI (gpt-5.2) returns in ~5-10s in this env; goy fortune reliably contains 'Lucky numbers:' — good indicator to poll. 411 branch flow: dial 4,1,1 then * to confirm; then digit 1/2/3 plays branch. In-call navigation: * replay, # another oracle (fortune only), 0 main menu. Config tabs testids: tab-programs, tab-oracles, tab-secrets, tab-schedules. Oracle rows: oracle-row-{slug} with oracle-{edit|clone|delete|save|toggle}-{slug}. Secret row edit form: secret-edit-{code}, secret-save-{code}, secret-edit-{title|text|clue}-{code}. Menu/CLUE badges use CSS text-transform:uppercase so text_content() returns lowercase — check case-insensitively.
